name: Ivory Beaded Mermaid Gown with Lace Long Sleeves
nameSwahili: Gauni la Harusi la Mermaid lenye Mikono ya Lace
description: Ivory beaded mermaid silhouette with sheer lace long sleeves and intricate pearl detailing across the bodice. Sweeping tulle train flares dramatically at the knee — a classic choice for a church ceremony and reception in one look.

name: Pearl-Beaded Mermaid Gown with Sheer Lace Sleeves
nameSwahili: Gauni la Mermaid lenye Lulu na Lace
description: Fitted pearl-beaded mermaid gown with sheer lace long sleeves, off-shoulder sweetheart neckline and pearl-encrusted bodice. Tulle skirt with satin trim hem gives a soft, romantic silhouette ideal for outdoor or garden weddings.

name: Silver Embroidered Off-Shoulder Ball Gown
nameSwahili: Gauni la Harusi la Ball Gown la Fedha
description: Silver-embroidered off-shoulder ball gown with cap sleeves, beaded bodice and corset-lace back. Voluminous sparkling tulle skirt with cathedral train — the show-stopper entrance gown for a grand church wedding.

name: Silver Sequin Ball Gown with Feather Cap Sleeves
nameSwahili: Gauni la Ball Gown la Sequins za Fedha
description: Dazzling silver sequin ball gown with feather-trimmed cap sleeves and heavily beaded bodice. Full tulle skirt with sequin overlay shimmers under every light — built for photographs and for being seen from across the hall.

name: White Feather-Shoulder Pearl Mermaid Sheath
nameSwahili: Gauni la Mermaid Lenye Manyoya na Lulu
description: Minimalist white mermaid sheath with feather-trimmed shoulder caps and an asymmetric cascade of pearls down the bodice. Sweetheart neckline with a soft train. Perfect for the modern bride who wants elegance without the full ball-gown volume.

name: White Corset-Back Off-Shoulder Ball Gown
nameSwahili: Gauni la Ball Gown Lenye Lace Nyuma
description: Classic white off-shoulder ball gown with keyhole-back and corset lacing, beaded bodice and full tulle skirt with cathedral-length train. Timeless church-wedding silhouette for the traditional bride.

name: White Beaded Ball Gown with Illusion Neckline and Fringe Sleeves
nameSwahili: Gauni la Ball Gown Lenye Illusion na Fringe
description: Romantic white ball gown with illusion neckline, beaded bodice and delicate fringe-bead cap sleeves. Tulle A-line skirt gives fairy-tale volume while the sheer neckline keeps the look soft and modern.
